contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: currency_conversion.html offchain support — Main Ledger routing live end-to-end
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/227
  
  Details:
  Completes the gap left after the initial Currency Conversion deploy: the DApp picker offered 'offchain (Main Ledger)' as a default option, but the receiving GAS still rejected those submissions as FAILED because validateManagedLedger() only matches the Shipment Ledger Listing registry. Now picks of offchain route the double-entry pair to the Main Ledger's 'offchain transactions' tab.
  
  Front-end (dapp PR #227, merged):
  - Added offchain (Main Ledger - Default) as the first option in the ledger picker, matching report_dao_expenses.html.
  - Replaced the hardcoded 13-currency datalist with a dynamic fetch from raw.githubusercontent.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/main/currencies.json (the canonical list rewritten by repackaging-currency-ingest GAS). Free-text input means anything missing can still be typed by hand.
  - Plumbing: loadCurrencies() runs in parallel with loadLedgers + loadManagers on page boot; updateLedgerLink hides 'View Ledger' anchor when no URL; submitReport translates ledgerSelect.value === 'offchain' to empty ledgerUrl in the signed payload. SW CACHE_NAME bumped v10 -> v11.
  
  Back-end (tokenomics commit ea9ed07, also live on clasp @8 deployment):
  - New OFFCHAIN_LEDGER_URL + OFFCHAIN_TRANSACTIONS_SHEET_NAME constants pointing at the same Main Ledger spreadsheet OFFCHAIN_TRANSACTIONS_SHEET_URL in tdg_expenses_processing.gs uses.
  - parseAndProcessCurrencyConversionLogs: relaxed the 'missing required fields' check so submissions with empty ledgerUrl + ledgerName='offchain' pass through to intake.
  - processNewCurrencyConversions: new isOffchain / managedLedger branch — empty URL routes to 'offchain transactions' (5 cols, no Category) instead of the 6-col managed AGL Transactions tab. Same -source / +target double-entry, same Warehouse Manager as Entity / Fund Handler, just one fewer column on the offchain side. Matches the offchain branch in tdg_expenses_processing.gs exactly.
  
  Doc:
  - CURRENCY_CONVERSION_IMPLEMENTATION.md 'Key Features §3' rewritten from 'Managed Ledgers Only' to 'Routing — managed AGL ledger OR offchain Main Ledger', describing both branches and the structural diff.
  - SCHEMA.md Currency Conversion tab 'Routing' bullet updated likewise.
  - Security checklist bullet matched.
  
  Process note (flagging honestly): the tokenomics back-end commit landed directly on main without going through a PR because the worktree I created with 'git worktree add -b feature/...' ended up with HEAD on main instead of the new feature branch — a quirk of the shared git database while the original tokenomics tree was on feature/asset-receipt-gas. The 'git push -u origin feature/...' I ran from the worktree pushed local-main's tip (which had my commit) to the feature branch on origin, and my commit subsequently ended up on origin/main when someone built the next docs commit on top. Not the intended path; will explicitly verify 'git branch --show-current' in worktrees before any future commit. Code is identical to what was tested live, just skipped the PR review step.
  
  Verified live by Gary: pick offchain on currency_conversion.html, submit a USD->Brazilian Reis test, intake row appears in Currency Conversion tab with empty Ledger URL, Status flips NEW -> PROCESSED within seconds (Edgar immediate-trigger), two new rows appear at the bottom of the Main Ledger's offchain transactions tab with the right shape.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
